name: baker-street
description: Sherlock Holmes Analytical Framework — 7 cognitive archetypes for multi-perspective analysis. Mines conflicts and blind spots across independent viewpoints.

plugins.name: sherlock
plugins.description: Multi-perspective analysis with 7 character-inspired cognitive lenses (Holmes, Watson, Mycroft, Moriarty, Adler, Lestrade, Hound). Three-layer synthesis engine with conflict mining and blind spot detection.
